contract_claim: Shadow char cap enforcement uses `break` on first overflow. If a large shadow doc causes total_chars to exceed _SHADOW_CHAR_CAP, all subsequent source files are silently skipped — even if they are individually small and would fit within the cap. A `continue` (skip-and-try-next) would be more accurate to the stated intent of capping total content.
observed_behavior: Shadow char cap enforcement uses `break` on first overflow. If a large shadow doc causes total_chars to exceed _SHADOW_CHAR_CAP, all subsequent source files are silently skipped — even if they are individually small and would fit within the cap. A `continue` (skip-and-try-next) would be more accurate to the stated intent of capping total content.
